bird.name: Black-tailed treecreeper
bird.summary: The black-tailed treecreeper (Climacteris melanurus) is a species of bird in the family Climacteridae. It is endemic to north and northwest…

relations.subject: Black-tailed treecreeper
relations.evidence: |last6=Franklin |first6=K.|publisher=CSIRO Publications|isbn=978-1-4863-1193-4|pages=422|year=2019|location=Victoria}} Habitat includes open grassy woodlands, savanna, dry forest, and moist lowland forest. It is the only treecreeper species found in northern Australia, and normally travels in pairs or trios, and occasionally small groups
